entry.title: IDC 36C79119D0007 (P00020) awarded to SIGNATURE CHOICE LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: NON-VA COMMUNITY HEALTHCARE CLAIMS PROCESSING&PROVIDER CUSTOMER SERVICE CONTACT CENTER

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: PHARMACY BENEFIT MANAGEMENT AND OTHER THIRD PARTY ADMINISTRATION OF INSURANCE AND PENSION FUNDS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:extentCompeted.description: FULL AND OPEN COMPETITION AFTER EXCLUSION OF SOURCES

ns1:typeOfSetAside.description: SERVICE DISABLED VETERAN OWNED SMALL BUSINESS SET-ASIDE
